title: ranunculus seguieri subsp. seguieri
intro: Ranunculus seguieri subsp. seguieri, also known as the Sardinian buttercup, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus seguieri subsp. seguieri include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into tinctures, infusions, or topical creams, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
